/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libldlidar_driver.so -o libldlidar_driver.so CMakeFiles/ldlidar_driver_shared.dir/ldlidar_driver/src/ldlidar_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldlidar_driver_shared.dir/ldlidar_driver/src/lipkg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldlidar_driver_shared.dir/ldlidar_driver/src/log_module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldlidar_driver_shared.dir/ldlidar_driver/src/serial_interface_linux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldlidar_driver_shared.dir/ldlidar_driver/src/sl_transform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldlidar_driver_shared.dir/ldlidar_driver/src/slbf.cpp.o
